events.title: Cayucos Friday Farmers' Market
events.window: Every Friday, 10am to 12:30pm, June 5 through Labor Day weekend
events.venue: Corner of D Street & Ocean Avenue, Cayucos
events.summary: Weekly open-air market at Ocean Ave & D St with local produce, flowers, and seafood. Runs every Friday through Labor Day weekend.

events.title: Brian Waterbury Memorial Rock to Pier Fun Run & Half Marathon
events.venue: Starts at Morro Rock, finishes at Cayucos Pier
events.organizer: City of Morro Bay Recreation Services
events.summary: 56th annual beach run: 6-mile fun run from Morro Rock to Cayucos Pier, plus a half marathon option. All ages welcome; post-race breakfast at Morro Rock.

events.title: Cayucos Antique Street Faire — Fall
events.venue: Ocean Avenue (Cayucos Drive to E Street), Cayucos
events.summary: 40th edition of the semi-annual outdoor antique fair with ~100 vendors selling vintage, collectibles & art along Ocean Ave. Free admission, dogs on leash welcome.

events.title: Estero Bluffs Coastal Cleanup Day
events.venue: Killer's Surf Spot (Fig Tree Parking Lot), Estero Bluffs State Park, Cayucos
events.summary: Annual volunteer beach cleanup covering 4 miles of Estero Bluffs coastline, held in coordination with California Coastal Cleanup Day. Bring gloves and a bucket.

events.title: 35th Annual Cayucos Car Show
events.summary: Classic and custom cars fill downtown Ocean Ave for a full day with a live band, beer garden, and Lions Club BBQ lunch. Free to spectators; rain or shine.

events.title: Christmas in Cayucos
events.venue: Corner of D Street & Ocean Avenue, Downtown Cayucos
events.summary: Community tree lighting, carolers, and Santa arriving by fire engine, followed by a Wonderland Walk with open shops, free trolley rides, and holiday refreshments.
